article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Feb 28, 2023 (BSS) - Metropolitan Chamber of Commerce and Industry (MCCI) has observed that Bangladesh's economy has been showing some signs of improvement.

In a report titled 'Review of Economic Situation in Bangladesh October - December 2022 (Q2 of FY23)', MCCI today mentioned that Bangladesh's robust economic recovery from the COVID-19 pandemic has been interrupted by the war in Russia-Ukraine, resultant supply-chain disruptions, global oil-and food-price spikes, slowdown in external

llm_connections.evidence_quote: The import payments and inward remittances, however, decreased, which has multiplier effects on other economic sectors.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article reports a decrease in import payments at the national level, which corresponds to the country-wide imports concept in the feature definition.
